heading: Enoggera Reservoir vs Epsom — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Enoggera Reservoir, Queensland and Epsom, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Enoggera Reservoir has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Epsom (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Enoggera Reservoir or Epsom safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Enoggera Reservoir has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Epsom scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Enoggera Reservoir scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Epsom scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Enoggera Reservoir or Epsom?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Enoggera Reservoir has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
